mapper.insert: insert into member_tbl values ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, null, #{memberEmail}, 3, sysdate, #{memberPostcode}, #{memberAddr}, #{memberDetailAddr}, 0, null )
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, c.hex_code FROM member_tbl m LEFT JOIN color_tbl c ON m.current_color_id = c.color_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update:
update member_tbl set member_thumb = #{memberThumb}, member_name = #{memberName}, member_email = #{memberEmail}, member_postcode = #{memberPostcode}, member_addr = #{memberAddr}, member_detail_addr = #{memberDetailAddr}, member_grade = #{memberGrade}, current_color_id = #{currentColorId}
where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
select * from member_tbl
member_name like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
member_id like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
member_email like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and member_grade = 1
and member_grade = 2
and member_grade = 3
order by member_id asc
order by member_id desc
order by member_name asc
order by member_name desc
offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only

select count(*) from member_tbl
member_name like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
member_id like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
member_email like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and member_grade = 1
and member_grade = 2
and member_grade = 3
SELECT c.hex_code FROM member_tbl m INNER JOIN color_tbl c ON (m.current_color_id = c.color_id) WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
